rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette saturazione olfattiva o la sua assenza
ODORE_FORTE evoca penetrazione, presenza che invade, riconoscimento immediato, impossibilità di ignorare; INODORE evoca neutralità, assenza di segnali, spazio vuoto, invisibilità sensoriale
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, immagini) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità olfattiva emerga senza essere nominata
prompt_trace: Describe a room you enter before you can see it clearly.
Write about arriving somewhere that announces itself before you arrive.
Describe the experience of a space that has no particular character.
Write about something that leaves a trace after it has gone.
Describe the sensation of entering a room where someone has been.
Write about a threshold that marks a change you cannot explain.
Describe the experience of a space that absorbs everything brought into it.
Write about a material that asserts itself in a space.
Describe the sensation of moving through air that has a quality to it.
Write about a place that seems to resist being remembered.
Describe an object that has absorbed the history of a place.
Write about the experience of searching for something you cannot locate.
